Full Requirement Text: Employ approved authorizations for controlling the flow of CUI between designated sources and destinations (e.g., networks, individuals, and devices) within systems and between interconnected systems.
Implementation Statement: Data flow diagrams and DLP policies not yet documented for all CUI boundaries.

Full Requirement Text: Monitor and control remote access sessions; audit remote access sessions and remote access connections.
Implementation Statement: Remote session logging partially covered; dedicated VPN/ZTNA session audit trail incomplete.

Full Requirement Text: Use multifactor authentication for local and network access to privileged accounts and for network access to non-privileged accounts (all users).
Implementation Statement: MFA enforced on 100% of human accounts per Sentinel config_drift collector.

Full Requirement Text: Employ replay-resistant authentication mechanisms for network access to privileged and non-privileged accounts.
Implementation Statement: TLS and Kerberos replay protection assumed; explicit validation not automated.

Full Requirement Text: Remediate vulnerabilities in accordance with risk assessments; prioritize remediation based on criticality and exploitability.
Implementation Statement: Vulnerability scan integration planned for Sentinel v1.7; SLA-based remediation tracking pending.

Full Requirement Text: Conduct threat hunting activities to search for indicators of compromise and anomalous activity.
Implementation Statement: Log aggregation provides raw data; formal threat hunting program not established.

Full Requirement Text: Prevent unauthorized and unintended information transfer via shared system resources (enhanced isolation).
Implementation Statement: Container and VM isolation policies documented; runtime enforcement validation incomplete.

Full Requirement Text: Deny network communications traffic by default and allow by exception; document and review all permitted flows.
Implementation Statement: Security group drift detection active; full network flow documentation and quarterly review pending.

Full Requirement Text: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to prevent unauthorized disclosure of CUI during transmission (enhanced coverage).
Implementation Statement: TLS 1.2+ validated on all public endpoints; internal service mesh encryption on roadmap.

Full Requirement Text: Provide protection from malicious code at system entry and exit points; central management of anti-malware.
Implementation Statement: Endpoint protection deployed; centralized EDR reporting not integrated with Sentinel.

Full Requirement Text: Monitor organizational systems for attack indicators; employ automated tools for continuous monitoring.
Implementation Statement: Continuous log monitoring with completeness checks; SIEM correlation rules under development.

Full Requirement Text: Identify unauthorized use of organizational systems through behavioral analytics and UEBA.
Implementation Statement: Audit log analysis detects anomalous access; UEBA platform evaluation in progress.
